summary: Single functional test failed due to network error: test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub] encountered repeated HTTP 502 responses from github.com when attempting to download a test package archive, exhausting retry attempts. All other 2833 tests passed.
root_cause: HTTPSConnectionPool connection to github.com exhausted max retries after receiving multiple HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error responses when downloading https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip

evidence.quote: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Explicit error message indicating GitHub returned HTTP 502 Bad Gateway errors repeatedly until the retry limit was exhausted

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Error message repeated 4 times in output, showing consistent network failure rather than random test flakiness
Only 1 failure out of 2833 total tests (1753 unit tests all passed, 1080 of 1081 functional tests passed), indicating isolated network issue, not a code defect

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job. The failure is due to temporary GitHub service unavailability (HTTP 502 errors). This is transient and should resolve when GitHub recovers or on the next CI run.
